params_used.custom_text: // This module compares two single-bit inputs, in1 and in2, and produces a one-bit output, signIfComp. The output indicates the result of the comparison: if in1 is less than in2, signIfComp is set to 1; if in2 is less than in1, signIfComp is set to 0; and if both inputs are equal, signIfComp is also set to 1, indicating a non-positive comparison.
